block_01: There are different technical indicators traders may use to find trading opportunities. If applied correctly, they might provide valuable insights into market changes and point to potential trading ideas. However, it may take novice traders some time to master these tools.
block_02: It is important to pick the right indicators and apply correct settings for optimal results. Several categories of indicators are available in the traderoom. You may use them separately or in combination to get more precise readings.
block_03: Getting the hang of technical indicators takes time and practice. To start off, take a look at this article: it offers an overview of the most popular indicator types and different ways to apply them in trading. This information might help you catch the right moment to make a trade.
